diagnoses.name: Atherosclerotic heart disease of native coronary arteries
diagnoses.evidence_span: atherosclerotic heart disease of native coronary arteries

diagnoses.name: Ventilator-associated pneumonia
diagnoses.evidence_span: developed ventilator-associated pneumonia while on mechanical ventilation

diagnoses.name: Unspecified convulsions
diagnoses.evidence_span: unspecified convulsions requiring management with antiepileptic therapy

diagnoses.name: Foreign object in respiratory tract
diagnoses.evidence_span: A foreign object was identified in the respiratory tract and required emergent intervention

diagnoses.name: Hypotension
diagnoses.evidence_span: suffered from hypotension requiring vasopressor support

diagnoses.name: Pericardial disease
diagnoses.evidence_span: demonstrated evidence of pericardial disease noted on imaging

diagnoses.name: Urinary tract infection
diagnoses.evidence_span: A urinary tract infection was diagnosed and treated

diagnoses.name: Respiratory failure with ventilator dependence
diagnoses.evidence_span: ventilator-dependent given his advanced ALS with respiratory compromise, requiring long-term mechanical support

procedures.name: Extirpation of Matter from Left Lower Lobe Bronchus via Natural or Artificial Opening Endoscopic
procedures.evidence_span: Extirpation of Matter from Left Lower Lobe Bronchus via Natural or Artificial Opening Endoscopic – Performed to clear obstructing material and manage aspiration risk

procedures.name: Extirpation of Matter from Right Lower Lung Lobe via Natural or Artificial Opening Endoscopic
procedures.evidence_span: Extirpation of Matter from Right Lower Lung Lobe via Natural or Artificial Opening Endoscopic – Complementary bronchoscopic intervention to clear bilateral lower lobe involvement

procedures.name: Respiratory Ventilation, 24-96 Consecutive Hours
procedures.evidence_span: Respiratory Ventilation, 24-96 Consecutive Hours – Mechanical ventilation support provided throughout hospitalization given ventilator dependence from progressive ALS and the acute infectious/cardiac complications

procedures.name: Cardiac catheterization
procedures.evidence_span: Cardiac catheterization was deferred given the patient's overall clinical status and goals of care discussion with family

procedures.name: Echocardiography
procedures.evidence_span: subsequent echocardiography showing pericardial effusion consistent with pericardial disease

medications.name: Insulin
medications.evidence_span: Insulin (variable dosing via subcutaneous injection per sliding scale)

medications.name: CefTAZidime
medications.evidence_span: Antimicrobial coverage was initiated for ventilator-associated pneumonia with CefTAZidime IV

medications.name: Midazolam
medications.evidence_span: Sedation management during mechanical ventilation included midazolam and lorazepam

medications.name: Lorazepam
medications.evidence_span: Sedation management during mechanical ventilation included midazolam and lorazepam

medications.name: Fentanyl citrate
medications.evidence_span: Pain control utilized fentanyl citrate as needed

medications.name: Magnesium sulfate
medications.evidence_span: Magnesium sulfate and calcium gluconate supplementation was necessary due to electrolyte disturbances

medications.name: Calcium gluconate
medications.evidence_span: Magnesium sulfate and calcium gluconate supplementation was necessary due to electrolyte disturbances

medications.name: Glucagon
medications.evidence_span: with glucagon and dextrose available for hypoglycemic episodes

medications.name: Dextrose
medications.evidence_span: with glucagon and dextrose available for hypoglycemic episodes

medications.name: Labetalol
medications.evidence_span: Beta-blockade with metoprolol tartrate and labetalol IV supported cardiac recovery and blood pressure management
